description: Adds the DNS records this domain needs to send authenticated business email through Next Surplus (SPF, DKIM, MX return-path, DMARC).
variableDescription: spfInclude: SPF include target that authorizes Next Surplus to send. dkimSelector: DKIM selector label for this domain. dkimPublicKey: DKIM public key value returned by Next Surplus after domain provisioning. returnPathTarget: MX return-path host for bounce processing.
